name: Cindy Hyde-Smith
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $814,281 for Cindy Hyde-Smith in U.S. Senate, MS. This dataset currently classifies this as Pro-Israel when total funding is above $0; additional primary-source statement and vote evidence should continue to be expanded.
